channel.title: Portapps
channel.description: Collection of portable apps for Windows

item.title: ueli portable 9.21.1-11
item.description:
Release of ueli portable 9.21.1-11 is now available.
You can find links to download this release on the ueli portable page.

item.title: VLC Media Player portable 3.0.21-12
item.description:
Release of VLC Media Player portable 3.0.21-12 is now available.
You can find links to download this release on the VLC Media Player portable page.

item.title: Ungoogled Chromium portable 134.0.6998.181-20
item.description:
Release of Ungoogled Chromium portable 134.0.6998.181-20 is now available.
You can find links to download this release on the Ungoogled Chromium portable page.

item.description:

item.title: Stormhen portable 137.0.1-45
item.description:

item.title: Molotov portable abandoned
item.description:
Molotov portable is not maintained anymore.
Downloads are still available on Molotov portable page.

item.title: mRemoteNG portable abandoned
item.description:
mRemoteNG portable is not maintained anymore as the main project seems abandonned.
Downloads are still available on mRemoteNG portable page.
